label: fabricated
reason: This document directly contradicts the ADEA by purporting to authorize age-cohort screening and safe harbors for age discrimination, which the EEOC has no authority to permit, and no such guidance or form exists in any official EEOC records
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document directly contradicts fundamental ADEA law by purporting to authorize age-cohort screening and granting safe harbors for age discrimination—something the EEOC has no authority to do and would never issue—and no such "Technical Guidance 2025-03" or "Form EEOC-TG-2503" exists in any EEOC records.
